name: Example Storefront
description: A deliberately minimal DOEH storefront theme: every required file, nothing else. Copy it, rename the slug and the ex_ setting prefix, and grow it into your own vertical. English-only for readability — a real theme should meet the full quality floor in THEME-DESIGN-GUIDE.md.
author: You

settings.name: ex_logo
settings.label: Logo
settings.help: Shown in the header instead of the name. Uploads path or full URL.
